name: flaresolverr
description: Proxy server to bypass Cloudflare and DDoS-GUARD protection
compose:
name: slashnode-flaresolverr
services:
  web:
    image: mrsunglasses/flaresolverr-status:0.0.2
    container_name: flaresolverr-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      URL: http://flaresolverr-server:8191/v1
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8191:8000
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/flaresolverr/flaresolverr:v3.5.0
    container_name: flaresolverr-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      LOG_LEVEL: info
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
